official_code.timing_boundary: The pinned commit is 12 days after arXiv v2 (updated 2026-05-24). The latest pre-v2 repository commit inspected was e982325 (2026-05-19; tree f5b2cafe88b9b2a21c1fb1732a88e5e3f21a15a1). The post-v2 commit changes three Agriculture verifiers and one task description, so post-v2 behavior is not projected backward into paper results.

environment_images.scope_note: The 53.77 GiB image objects were not downloaded. Revision-pinned API metadata, object sizes, Git OIDs, and LFS SHA-256 identifiers are preserved. Application source revisions and image build recipes are not exposed by the inspected package.
